allow: Bash(printf '\\n.cm-points-balance {\\n  display: flex;\\n  align-items: center;\\n  gap: 8px;\\n  padding: 10px 14px;\\n  border-radius: 8px;\\n  background: rgba\(212,160,23,.08\);\\n  border: 1px solid rgba\(212,160,23,.2\);\\n  color: var\(--c-gold-lt\);\\n  font-size: .84rem;\\n}\\n.cm-points-balance i { color: var\(--c-gold\); }\\n.cm-pts-warn {\\n  margin-left: auto;\\n  font-size: .72rem;\\n  font-weight: 900;\\n  color: var\(--c-red-neon\);\\n  text-transform: uppercase;\\n  letter-spacing: .05em;\\n}\\n')
